base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of kintaro — a character (boss) from 1993 mortal kombat ii. Kintaro — sub-boss (replaces Goro from MK1). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Kintaro — sub-boss (replaces Goro from MK1); 4-armed tiger-humanoid. Teleport-stomp + Fireball
